column1: If Maria goes abroad, she ______ (to go) to England or America.
She ______ (to visit) London if she goes to England.
If she _______ (stay) in London, she will spend much money.
If her holiday is very short, she ________ (not to practice) her English.
It will be a pity if she _______ (not to try) to speak English.
If Molly _______ (to leave) now, she’ll catch the bus.
If I stay in bed, I _____ (to feel) better.
Unless I work hard, I ______ (not to get) a job.
If I _____ (to go) shopping, I will spend much money.
If you ride a bike, you ______ (to get) there quickly.
If you come now, we _______ (to go out) together.
